auc_value: CRP_Delta AUC 0.903; SOFA AUC 0.762; PCT_Delta AUC 0.843; NLR AUC 0.716; LAC_Base AUC 0.689
notes: Decline in PCT, CRP, and LAC over the initial 72 h of hospitalization was a robust indicator of improved survival, independent of other clinical and laboratory parameters. Dynamic changes were superior to baseline values in predicting 30-day mortality.
